commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# pre-push hook — builds & deploys the Flutter APK to Google Drive whenever
# a push targets the main or master branch.
#
# Install once with:
#   cp scripts/hooks/pre-push .git/hooks/pre-push
#   chmod +x .git/hooks/pre-push
# Or run: bash scripts/install_hooks.sh

set -euo pipefail

REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"

SHOULD_BUILD=0
while IFS=' ' read -r _local_ref _local_sha remote_ref _remote_sha; do
    if [[ "$remote_ref" == "refs/heads/main" || \
          "$remote_ref" == "refs/heads/master" ]]; then
        SHOULD_BUILD=1
        break
    fi
done

if [[ "$SHOULD_BUILD" -eq 0 ]]; then
    # Not pushing to main/master — skip the build.
    exit 0
fi

echo ""
echo ">>> [pre-push] Push to main detected — starting build & deploy…"
echo ""

# Run from the repo root so relative paths in the build script resolve correctly.
cd "$REPO_ROOT"
exec bash scripts/build_and_copy.sh
